content.full_text:
July 18, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, California 95814  

Dear Commission:

It is my understanding that there is no longer a need to restrict campaign funds that were received prior to January 1, 1989.

Please send information as to the legal use and disposition of these funds as we are presently responsible for the accounting of such an account.

Sincerely,

Karen Bass  
Accountant
